intro.title: Liton Network
intro.description: These Terms of Use govern access to and use of the Liton Network platform and the services offered.
intro.highlight: By creating an account or using the application, you fully agree to these terms.

s01.title: Purpose of the Service
paragraphs: Liton Network offers a digital platform enabling, among other things:
listItems: The use of an internal wallet
Access to features related to digital assets and services offered on the platform
s01.note: The platform may evolve at any time with the addition, modification, or removal of certain features.

s02.title: Registration Requirements
paragraphs: To use the platform, the user must:
listItems: Be legally authorized to use this type of service under the laws of their country
s02.important: The user is responsible for all activities carried out from their account.

s03.title: Identity Verification (KYC)
paragraphs: Liton Network may require an identity verification process (KYC) before access to certain features.
The user agrees to provide the requested documents in order to:
listItems: Comply with applicable legal and regulatory obligations

warning.title: Any refusal to verify may result in:

s04.title: Internal Wallet and Deposits
paragraphs: Liton Network uses an internal wallet system.
When a user makes a deposit:
listItems: A deposit address may be generated
Funds are verified before being credited
The corresponding amount is then added to the user's internal wallet

warningBox.title: The user is solely responsible for:
items: Sending funds to the correct address

s04.note: The platform cannot be held responsible for losses resulting from a user error, an incorrect blockchain network, a transfer to an incorrect address, or an error from a third-party service.

s05.title: Prohibited Activities
dangerList: Use the platform for illegal activities
Manipulate reward, investment, or referral systems

warning.title: Any violation may result in:
items: Temporary or permanent blocking of funds where permitted by law

s06.title: Account Security
paragraphs: The user is responsible for the confidentiality of:
s06.important: In the event of suspected unauthorized access, the user must immediately contact Liton Network support.

s07.title: Financial Risks
paragraphs: Digital assets and investment-related services carry significant risks.
listItems: No income or profit is guaranteed

warningBox.title: Liton Network does not provide any personalized financial, tax, or legal advice.
warningBox.note: Each user remains solely responsible for their financial decisions.

paragraphs: Liton Network reserves the right to suspend or close an account in the event of:
s08.note: Certain verifications may be required before any withdrawal or account reactivation.

s09.title: Service Availability
paragraphs: We do our best to ensure the continuous availability of the platform.
However, Liton Network does not guarantee:
s09.note: Maintenance operations or technical incidents may temporarily affect access to the application.

s10.title: Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: To the extent permitted by law, Liton Network cannot be held liable for:
listItems: Actions carried out by third parties
Indirect damages resulting from the use of the platform

s11.title: Privacy Policy
paragraphs: The collection, processing, and protection of personal data are governed by Liton Network's Privacy Policy.
s11.important: By using the platform, the user acknowledges having read this policy and agrees to it.

s12.title: Modification of Terms
paragraphs: Liton Network may modify these Terms of Use at any time.
Updates will be published in the application or on the official website.
s12.important: Continued use of the service after modification constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

s13.title: Termination
paragraphs: The user may request the closure of their account at any time, subject to:

s14.title: Applicable Law
paragraphs: These Terms of Use are governed by the laws applicable in the country where the platform operates.
s14.note: Any dispute will fall under the jurisdiction of the competent courts.
